summary: Excellent soundboard composite captures a gorgeous Stella Blue, praised as the most complete and beautiful recording on the archive.
review: Both reviewers award five stars, calling this version the most complete and best sounding SBD available. The standout moment is an “outrageously gorgeous” rendition of Stella Blue, and the composite soundboard mix is described as beautiful with no noted flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise (5‑star) for both performance and recording quality, with no criticisms; reviewers highlight exceptional soundboard clarity and a standout Stella Blue.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Composite SBD praised as the most complete and beautiful version on the archive; no technical complaints reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Specific setlist details not provided; reviewers focus on overall excellence and a highlight performance of Stella Blue.
